subject: FW: Second Amendment to RFP
body:
Shall I send to Andrew?

 

From: amartinez@PRIDCO.COM [mailto:amartinez@PRIDCO.COM] 
Sent: Thursday, January 10, 2008 4:32 PM
To: pf@ciudaddelaluzestudios.com; tschultz@caribbeanrg.com; robert.rasmussen@shawgrp.com; mitchell.bormack@shawgrp.com; fredsuder@borgerriver.org; slichter@irg.cc; jinfantino@federaldevelopement.com; frank.wilbourne@antillesenergy.com; jmangual@uniproaep.net; spectrum@centennialpr.net; mmaxman@bakerlaw.com; jrfoster44@bellsouth.net; afarkas@islandglobalyachting.com; bwilson@prologis.com; wray.russell@actuslendlease.com; murph_278@hotmail.com; amaren007@verizon.net; vafa.valapour@jumeirahcapital.com; peteromero@experioradvisory.com; sdev@coqui.net; richben@bigplanet.com; Lesley Groff; mmclean@centrumproperties.com
Cc: Freddy_De_Jesus/PRIDCO@pridco.com; ajcolorado@msn.com
Subject: Second Amendment to RFP
Importance: High

 


The attached document is being sent on behalf of Antonio J. Colorado, Executive Director, Portal del Futuro.   
  
Feel free to contact Mr. Colorado at 787-649-9426 if you have any questions regarding the content in the Second Amendment to Request for Proposals Public-Private Partnership for Purchase and Development of former Naval Station Roosevelt Roads. 
  
You can also find the document at Portal’s website: www.portaldelfuturo.com <http://www.portaldelfuturo.com/> .  After entering the website, click on English then click on News/RFP. 
  

Regards, 
  
Alfonso Martínez 
Finance Director 
Portal del Futuro 

787-622-9433

Subject: Second Amendment to RFP
Importance: High

 


The attached document is being sent on behalf of Antonio J. Colorado, Executive Director, Portal del Futuro.  
 
Feel free to contact Mr. Colorado at 787-649-9426 if you have any questions regarding the content in the Second Amendment to Request for Proposals Public-Private Partnership for Purchase and Development of former Naval Station Roosevelt Roads.
 
You can also find the document at Portal’s website: www.portaldelfuturo.com.  After entering the website, click on English then click on News/RFP.
 

Regards,
 
Alfonso Martínez
